name: Vegetable Slaw with Honey Mustard Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 large Red Bell Peppers (remove seeds, thinly slice)
2 medium Green Bell Peppers (remove seeds, thinly slice)
2 large Carrots (peel, cut into 2-inch lengths, then thin strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables: Core and shred the cabbage; remove seeds and thinly slice the red and green bell peppers; peel and cut the carrots into 2-inch lengths, then thin strips.
2. Combine all dressing ingredients in a separate bowl: Whisk together Miracle Whip, plain yogurt, lemon juice, grainy mustard, honey, red wine vinegar, Tabasco sauce, salt, and pepper until smooth.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, sliced bell peppers, carrot strips, and chopped parsley.
4. Pour the prepared dressing over the vegetables and toss to coat evenly.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least one hour before serving. Taste and adjust seasoning as desired.
